FAST Unimerchant KPI Dashboard · Data sourced live from Google Sheets (Sellout & Target tabs) · Site list is shared across everyone using this dashboard file

Manage Sites

Connect a Google Sheet per site. New sites appear automatically — no code changes needed.
Each site's Google Sheet must follow the template (tabs named exactly Sellout and Target, headers in row 1) and be shared publicly for viewing.
  1. In Google Sheets: Share → General access → Anyone with the link — Viewer
  2. Confirm tabs are named Sellout and Target
  3. Paste the sheet's URL (or ID) below
